calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding. Documents (in a sealed envelope) produced pursuant to Gary Near's Subpeona duces tecum was given to Mr. O'Keeffe (Counsel for Mr. Near) by the Clerk prior to commencement of the proceeding.

This matter was called with Cross-Petition in case number PED-12-295911, Gary J. Near vs. Harry Campbell.

Appearances: Harry Campbell (Petitioner/Respondent in pro per). Sam O'Keeffe for and with Gary Near (Responent/Petitioner).

The Court stated these are Cross-Petition for each side and Tro was issued for each side.

The Court hears testimony and after hearing the testimony presented, the Court granted each side's Request for Restaining Order as follows: Each side shall stay at least 100 yards away from the each other except when they are in 1408 California Street and that they must stay two yards away and move from the doorway if the other person needs to use the front door.

After hearing the Court's ruling, Mr. O'Keeffe requested for a brief recess to confer with his client and Mr. Campbell for a less restrictive order. The Court advised Mr. Campbell that a dismissal to his petition does not prevent him from filing a new petition. Each side agreed to withdraw their petition for restraining order. No orders are issued by the Court.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Elder and Dependent Adult Abuse OSC & TRO Hearing.
Dept. 204, Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sherry Sawyer #5976, Bailiff Deputy Guitron.
Plaintiff Harry T. Campbell and Defendant Gary Near were present in pro per, placed under oath and direct examined.
Proof of Service is in the file.
The Court granted defendant's request for a continuance to seek representation by counsel and continued the matter to 08-15-12 at 1:30 pm. in dept. 204 with TRO in place, Order signed in open court.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Continued To Aug-01-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: All parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: Gary Near (Respondent).

The Court noted that this case has been continued to August 1, 2012 at 1:30 p.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Near informed the Court that he was served yesterday afternoon and that he will seek an order to modify the TRO.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR#5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
